title: Japan seeks candid dialog, defense minister says, rejecting 'neo-militarism' claims
summary: Japan's defense minister calls for transparency and dialogue to address regional tensions, refuting claims of neo-militarism. This diplomatic approach reflects Japan's strategy to ease geopolitical concerns in the region.
content: Koizumi calls for transparency and dialog as he addresses tensions in the region.

zh.title: 日本寻求坦诚对话，防长拒绝'新军国主义'指控
zh.summary: 日本防长呼吁透明度和对话以解决地区紧张局势，驳斥新军国主义指控。这种外交方式反映了日本缓解地区地缘政治顾虑的战略。
